title: How to Make a Killing
posterAlt: How to Make a Killing (2026) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Disowned at birth by his obscenely wealthy family, blue-collar Becket Redfellow will stop at nothing to reclaim his inheritance, no matter how many relatives stand in his way.
synopsis: How to Make a Killing is a 2026 comedy and thriller film from United Kingdom and France. It carries a 6.5 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
